sessions.intent: Create comprehensive builder architecture and eval strategy document

before.assumptions: Builder works for simple hello world. Two-pass LLM strategy exists but needsDetail is crude. No eval suite. Prior work in builder-improvement-options.md.
before.risk: Low — planning/documentation session, no code changes

sessions.intent: Implement Data.Compare, 38 eval .goal files, and eval runner

before.assumptions: Data class exists at PLang/App/Data/this.cs as partial class. No Compare method exists. 127 module actions registered. .pr format uses Json.CamelCaseIndented with [Store] filtering. Builder works for existing test .goal files.
before.risk: Medium — new method on core Data class, 38 new files. Compare method must handle JSON boxing issues (int/long/double).

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data.Compare as new partial file (this.Compare.cs) — JSON-level structural diff. 2. C# tests for Compare. 3. Write 38 eval .goal files per architect catalogue. 4. Build, verify .pr output, save as .golden. 5. Write eval runner PLang goal.

sessions.intent: Convert action handler properties from plain types to Data<T> in list/, loop/, math/, event/ modules

before.assumptions: Data.@this<T> wrapper exists and is used in file/ modules already. Pattern is established. Source generator handles lazy resolution.
before.risk: Medium — many files, mechanical but must be precise with .Value/.Value! access in Run() methods.

sessions.intent: Make builder correctly unwrap Data<T> in type names, valid values, and parameter type stamping

before.assumptions: GetTypeName doesn't unwrap Data<T>, GetValidValues doesn't unwrap Data<T>, NormalizeParameterTypes doesn't stamp missing types from schema. UnwrapType already exists for schema discovery but isn't used elsewhere.
before.risk: Low — additive changes to existing methods, no behavior change for non-Data types

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data<T> unwrapping to GetTypeName() and GetValidValues() in TypeMapping.cs. 2. Add parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes(). 3. Add C# tests for all changes. 4. Verify with dotnet build and test run.

actions.context: Added Data<T> unwrapping in GetTypeName() and GetValidValues()
Added parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes()
6 new tests for Data<T> unwrapping and Describe integration

after.notes: Ready for end-to-end verification with plang build
